label: Phase 007 exists but arc parent metadata still registers only phase 006
recommended_action: Register phase 007 in parent phase map and graph metadata, or stop claiming the parent was reopened for 007.

label: Phase 007 benchmark report required by REQ-010 is absent
file_evidence: benchmark-2026-05-21-spec-memory-mps: fixture and run JSONL present; benchmark_report.md absent
recommended_action: Finish the MPS benchmark report and closeout validation before treating 007 as evidence-bearing.

label: PROMOTE-only Qwen model flip is present without phase 007 closeout evidence
recommended_action: Complete the PROMOTE path with report, default gate, rebuild, validation, and docs, or remove/park the model flip until evidence exists.

label: Multi-model sidecar rejects non-default model requests unless RERANK_ALLOWED_MODELS is manually set
recommended_action: Default/launcher allowlist should include both consumer models, or docs must state the required RERANK_ALLOWED_MODELS value.

label: Non-default allowlisted models are not revision-pinned despite sidecar invariant
recommended_action: Require RERANK_MODEL_REVISIONS for every non-default allowlisted model, or narrow the invariant to the default model only.

label: Sidecar /health docs show the old response shape after v0.2.0 multi-model fields were added
recommended_action: Update SKILL.md and README health examples to include default_model, allowed_models, and loaded_models.

label: Phase 006 promises a 007-cocoindex-rerank-baseline-drift follow-on, but phase 007 is the MPS packet
recommended_action: Create the baseline-drift follow-on under a non-conflicting phase number, or update phase 006 to point at the actual tracking location.

label: Phase 006 tasks are checked complete while evidence cells still say pending
recommended_action: Backfill exact evidence in tasks.md or cross-link to implementation-summary evidence rows.
